heading: Wednesday Night
text: Cloudy. Chance of rain or snow showers south of Route 4, likely to the north, with some brief freezing rain possible late near the international border. Lows in the upper 20s to lower 30s north, and mid to upper 30s in the south. Winds becoming south to southeast around 5 mph.

heading: Thursday
text: Mostly cloudy. Scattered rain showers in the south; scattered snow or rain showers north, changing to rain showers. Highs from the mid 50s to around 60 south, and upper 40s to mid 50s north, with some mid 40s northeast. South to southeast winds 5 to 15 mph, becoming southwest.

heading: Thursday Night
text: Mostly cloudy. Rain developing early, mixing with or changing to snow north, except becoming all snow over the mountain summits, all diminishing late in the valleys. Lows in the 20s to around 30 north, 30s to around 40 in the south. Southwest winds 5 to 15 mph, becoming northwest and gusting to 25 mph late.
